methods.description: Compilation of species records for three foraminiferal taxa from previous research to assess their biogeography and environmental requirements.

steps.description: A total of 189 records of the three foraminiferal taxa were available through previous research on the biogeography of larger foraminifera.
steps.searchable_summary: compile species records from previous research

steps.description: The accuracy of the coordinates was assessed with DIVA-GIS 7.1.7 by comparing information provided with the records with locality (land shape, bathymetry).

methods.description: Acquisition and processing of oceanographic data via remote sensing to obtain sea-surface temperature and salinity information for environmental analysis.

steps.description: Information on oceanographic data was obtained via remote sensing. For sea-surface temperature (SST) we used daytime and nighttime monthly averages from 1985 to 2007 with a resolution of 4 km.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain SST data from remote sensing

steps.description: Annual mean sea-surface temperatures were calculated from the monthly averages with DIVA-GIS.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate annual mean SST using DIVA-GIS

steps.description: The datasets were converted to raster format compatible with GISs and were, if necessary, interpolated with ArcGis 9.3 using a bivariate smoothing spline.
steps.searchable_summary: convert datasets to raster format and interpolate with ArcGis

methods.description: Estimation of likely range changes under a future climate scenario using the AquaMaps dataset and the IPCC climate change scenario A1B.

steps.description: To estimate likely range changes under a future climate scenario, we used the AquaMaps dataset, which describes variations in annual mean sea-surface temperatures as expected in 2050.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain future SST data from AquaMaps

steps.description: The local differences between the present and the future temperature layers were calculated for each grid-cell and added to our own data set following the delta approach.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate local temperature differences using delta approach
